Sample coverage: number of employees and self-employed persons in the sample / number of employees and self-employed persons in target population (%)
Sample size= number of active enterprises in the sample (Alternatively, legal units may be used)
Sample ratio= number of active enterprises in the sample / number of active enterprises in the target population (%) (Alternatively, legal units may be used)

Weighted response rate= Unit non-response shall be weighted, preferably by number of employees and self-employed persons. (Alternatively, net turnover may be used or administrative data i.e. social security data for employment)
Unweighted response rate: number of responding active enterprises / number of active enterprise in the sample (%)
